name: dnd-meta-game
description: D&D Meta Game - AI-powered solo D&D campaign management system

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run server" "npm run client:wait"
scripts.client:wait: wait-on -t 30000 http://localhost:3000/api/health && cd client && npm run dev
scripts.offline: npm run build && npm run start
scripts.install-all: npm install && cd client && npm install
